meta.title: Building An OT Capable SOC
meta.description:
Matt Cowell of Dragos describes the people, processes and technologies that lead to an effective OT SOC. He also talks about the many different forms an OT capability in a SOC can take and what may be right for you.

Being on the S4x20 Sponsor Stage there is also some content on how Dragos can help make your OT SOC a success.
